news.title: Idea Jam gives students opportunity to collaborate, pitch proposal to enhance campus life
news.summary_en: Winning team pitched plan for another convenient grab-and-go dining option.

news.summary_cn: Winning team pitched plan for another convenient grab-and-go dining option.

news.title: Mizzou researchers turn up the heat on tomatoes
news.summary_en: Show Me Research project focuses on why tomatoes don’t produce the compound that gives peppers their spice.
news.original_title: Mizzou researchers turn up the heat on tomatoes
news.summary_cn: Show Me Research project focuses on why tomatoes don’t produce the compound that gives peppers their spice.

news.title: Mizzou students work behind the scenes to support nursing simulation center
news.summary_en: Work-study students ensure the Sinclair School of Nursing’s simulation center operates flawlessly, preparing future nurses for life-saving moments.
news.original_title: Mizzou students work behind the scenes to support nursing simulation center
news.summary_cn: Work-study students ensure the Sinclair School of Nursing’s simulation center operates flawlessly, preparing future nurses for life-saving moments.

news.title: Mizzou’s College of Veterinary Medicine provides specialized surgery for a smoother recovery
news.summary_en: Through early detection and collaborative expertise, Cooper became a candidate an advanced surgical option not widely available in the region.
news.original_title: Mizzou’s College of Veterinary Medicine provides specialized surgery for a smoother recovery
news.summary_cn: Through early detection and collaborative expertise, Cooper became a candidate an advanced surgical option not widely available in the region.

news.title: Meet a Mizzou involvement ambassador
news.summary_en: As an involvement ambassador, Catelynn Liniger empowers students to find their place, build meaningful connections and make the most of their Mizzou experience.
news.summary_cn: As an involvement ambassador, Catelynn Liniger empowers students to find their place, build meaningful connections and make the most of their Mizzou experience.

news.title: Equipped with real-world training, Mizzou graduate launches career in nuclear medicine
news.summary_en: Gracie Loepker, BHS ’25, works alongside physicians to perform scans and administer radiopharmaceuticals at Barnes-Jewish Hospital.
news.original_title: Equipped with real-world training, Mizzou graduate launches career in nuclear medicine
news.summary_cn: Gracie Loepker, BHS ’25, works alongside physicians to perform scans and administer radiopharmaceuticals at Barnes-Jewish Hospital.

news.title: Mizzou’s bench-to-bedside efforts support a new drug for a neuromuscular disorder with no cure
news.summary_en: The drug, ignaseclant, helped people with Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease in a clinical trial at Mizzou’s NextGen Precision Health building.
news.original_title: Mizzou’s bench-to-bedside efforts support a new drug for a neuromuscular disorder with no cure
news.summary_cn: The drug, ignaseclant, helped people with Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease in a clinical trial at Mizzou’s NextGen Precision Health building.
